data.title: Ethereum network Base, backed by Coinbase, to move away from Optimism tech for quicker updates and lower costs.
data.description: The Ethereum layer-2 network named Base is moving away from the Optimism technology stack in favor of faster upgrades and reduced overhead. This change comes as Base aims to improve its performance and efficiency. Ethereum has a layered structure to scale its network, with layer-2 solutions serving as off-chain scalability solutions. Base's decision reflects a growing trend in the blockchain space towards optimizing technology stacks for better performance. Ethereum's layer-2 solutions are crucial for handling the network's increasing activity levels, with Base's move likely to impact a significant portion of the network's operations. This transition highlights the importance of continuous innovation and adaptation in the ever-evolving blockchain ecosystem.

data.title: Assurant (NYSE: AIZ) wins Feefo Platinum Trusted Service Award in NZ for 2026, known for exceptional customer experiences.
data.description: In Auckland, New Zealand, Assurant, Inc. (NYSE: AIZ), a prominent global protection firm specializing in safeguarding and servicing connected devices, homes, and automobiles in collaboration with top brands, disclosed that it has been honored with the Feefo Platinum Trusted Service Award. This prestigious award is reserved for businesses that consistently provide exceptional customer experiences. It is awarded to companies that have maintained outstanding service standards over time. This recognition signifies Assurant's dedication to delivering top-notch services to its customers.

data.title: Nasdaq leads with solar stocks shining; Dow rises. Nvidia up with Meta deal. Amer Sports breakout.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a rise in trading activity as market breadth increased. Nvidia's stock saw a significant jump following its deal with Meta. Additionally, the Nasdaq index led the upside momentum, with solar stocks standing out. Amer Sports also experienced a breakout, further adding to the positive market sentiment.

data.title: Giga Metals Corp. to conduct geophysical program in Attic Zone, expanding on 2025 work, exploring for copper, platinum, and palladium. CEO Scott Lendrum announces fully funded spring field program.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 18, 2026, Scott Lendrum, the CEO of Giga Metals Corp., shared plans for a fully funded spring field program at the Turnagain Project. The program, financed through various stock exchanges including TSX-V (GIGA), OTCQB (GIGGF), and FSE (BRR2), aims to build upon the accomplishments of 2025 and methodically progress the exploration of the Attic Zone. This zone shows promise for containing copper, platinum, and palladium deposits, indicating significant potential for further mineral discoveries.

data.title: World Liberty Financial to tokenize loan revenue interests in Trump International Hotel & Resort, Maldives in partnership with DarGlobal and Securitize.
data.description: Palm Beach, Florida-based World Liberty Financial (WLFI) has revealed its intention to tokenize loan revenue interests for Trump International Hotel & Resort in Maldives. This endeavor is a collaboration with Securitize, Inc., a prominent platform for tokenizing tangible assets, and DarGlobal PLC (LSE: DAR), an esteemed international luxury real estate developer. The move signifies WLFI's comprehensive plan to create, organize, and disseminate WLFI-branded tokenized real-world asset opportunities. This inaugural offering is part of a broader initiative by WLFI, showcasing their dedication to developing and distributing such offerings.
